title: Tao Te Ching 38
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 38 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 38 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: The highest virtue is not virtuous; therefore it has virtue. The lowest virtue clings to virtue; therefore it has no virtue.
